videos.title: A Precon Storm Is Brewing! - WPCS 151
videos.description:
Throwing down with Tarkir: Dragonstorm Precons! See what's new from Magic's newest set, as the crew sit down and fight with some of the preconstructed commander decks.

Decklists - 
Brent: https://moxfield.com/decks/fa4bm1rAAkSolhMlp2-xPg
CGB: https://moxfield.com/decks/KICDycSr6kupGrfmjTJAaA
Shea: https://moxfield.com/decks/a5gGz_AY5E2m53BGp46epA

videos.title: Tarkir Dragonstorm!  Early Commander Gameplay  Teval v Betor v Elsha v Eshki  WPCS 150
videos.description:
Get your Tarkir: Dragonstorm cards today! http://mtg.social/WorstCommanderShow

We have summoned Dragon masters from other worlds!  @VoxyTwitch @Cimoooooooo @Amazonian  step into the Worst Possible arena with CovertGoBlue to battle with new cards from Tarkir: Dragonstorm.  Thank you to Wizards of the Coast for the early access to these cards.


Decklists - 
CGB - Elsha, Threefold Master: https://moxfield.com/decks/6K8TI6wUXkqJHcGIoihAfg
Cimo - Teval, Arbiter of Virtue: https://moxfield.com/decks/gLjC8To13kutCi-eSMETAw
Voxy - Eshki, Temur's Roar: https://moxfield.com/decks/JXDySrycrkG5e1MUBe6I6Q (Missing: Dragonclaw Strike)
Amy - Betor, Kin to All: https://moxfield.com/decks/bb6r-CY38Ume7W4ci3Wetg
